[detached HEAD 12ad0bdd] fix(ui): replace raw palette layer badges with semantic badge-layer-* tokens [ddx-d0e8888b]
 3 files changed, 48 insertions(+), 10 deletions(-)

data.text: Done. Replaced raw `purple-/blue-/teal-` Tailwind palette classes in both runs pages' `layerBadgeClass()` with new `.badge-layer-work/try/run` utilities backed by `--layer-{work,try,run}-{text,surface,border}` CSS variables (light + dark) added to `app.css`, mirroring the existing `badge-status-*` token pattern. Replaced `text-xl`/`text-sm` on the runs index header with `text-headline-lg font-headline-lg`/`text-body-sm`.
